heading: (intro)
raw: Directed by Carl Theodor Dreyer. Written by Joseph Delteil.
clean: Directed by Carl Theodor Dreyer. Written by Joseph Delteil.

heading: Jeanne d'Arc
raw: Dear God, I accept my death gladly but do not let me suffer too long. Will I be with You tonight in Paradise?
clean: Dear God, I accept my death gladly but do not let me suffer too long. Will I be with You tonight in Paradise?

heading: Jeanne d'Arc
raw: You claim that I am sent by the Devil. It's not true. To make me suffer, the Devil has sent you... and you... and you... and you.
clean: You claim that I am sent by the Devil. It's not true. To make me suffer, the Devil has sent you... and you... and you... and you.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Jeanne d'Arc: In France, I am called Joan... in my village, I am called Jeanneton.
clean: In France, I am called Joan... in my village, I am called Jeanneton.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Évêque Pierre Cauchon: So you think God hates the English?
clean: Évêque Pierre Cauchon: So you think God hates the English?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Jeanne d'Arc: I don't know if God loves or hates the English; but I do know that the English will all be chased from France - except those that die here!
clean: I don't know if God loves or hates the English; but I do know that the English will all be chased from France - except those that die here!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Juge: Has God promised you things?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Jeanne d'Arc: That has nothing to do with this trial!
clean: That has nothing to do with this trial!
